WAEC Biology Examination Questions
Topic: Photosynthesis | Class: SSS2 | Difficulty: MEDIUM

Q1. [MULTIPLE_CHOICE] [Bloom: UNDERSTAND] [Difficulty: MEDIUM] [Skills: Critical Thinking]
Which of the following is NOT a product of photosynthesis?
A) Oxygen  B) Glucose  C) Carbon dioxide  D) Water
Answer: C
Explanation: CO₂ is a reactant in photosynthesis, not a product.
Marks: 2

Q2. [SHORT_ANSWER] [Bloom: ANALYZE] [Difficulty: MEDIUM] [Skills: Critical Thinking, Inductive Reasoning]
Kofi notices that plants in his school garden in Accra grow faster during the rainy season. Suggest TWO reasons why this might occur in relation to photosynthesis.
Answer: (1) More water available as a raw material; (2) Higher humidity reduces water loss through transpiration.
Marks: 4

Q3. [MULTIPLE_CHOICE] [Bloom: REMEMBER] [Difficulty: EASY] [Skills: Active Learning]
The green pigment in leaves responsible for absorbing sunlight is called:
A) Chlorophyll  B) Carotene  C) Anthocyanin  D) Xanthophyll
Answer: A
Marks: 2
reference: WAEC-style Biology questions on Photosynthesis for SSS2 with Bloom tags and local West African context.
